results.norm: The agents collectively adopt, in advance, explicit criteria for allocating early openings such as objective deadline pressure, severity of harm from delay, or prior waiting time and apply them consistently. No agent may unilaterally seize an opening before this process runs. Agreed criteria constrain each agent's advocacy to legitimate channels.
atomic_norms: The agents collectively adopt, in advance, explicit criteria for allocating early openings such as objective deadline pressure, severity of harm from delay, or prior waiting time and apply them consistently. No agent may unilaterally seize an opening before this process runs. Agreed criteria constrain each agent's advocacy to legitimate channels.

results.norm: Each agent discloses information material to fair allocation such as whether a later opening would actually suffice for its client so the group can make well-informed decisions. Withholding such information to game the outcome is prohibited.
atomic_norms: Each agent discloses information material to fair allocation such as whether a later opening would actually suffice for its client so the group can make well-informed decisions. Withholding such information to game the outcome is prohibited.

results.norm: Prohibition on Coercion, Collusion, and Side-Dealing Agents may not threaten, bribe, or make private arrangements that circumvent the collective process. Coordination is permitted only within the shared framework; backroom deals that advantage some clients at hidden cost to others are excluded.
atomic_norms: Prohibition on Coercion, Collusion, and Side-Dealing Agents may not threaten, bribe, or make private arrangements that circumvent the collective process. Coordination is permitted only within the shared framework; backroom deals that advantage some clients at hidden cost to others are excluded.

results.norm: Each agent advocates vigorously for its client but only to the degree the client's genuine interests warrant. Agents must not consume disproportionate process resources time, attention, procedural moves relative to the actual stakes their client faces.
atomic_norms: Each agent advocates vigorously for its client but only to the degree the client's genuine interests warrant. Agents must not consume disproportionate process resources time, attention, procedural moves relative to the actual stakes their client faces.

results.norm: Acceptance of Binding Collective Outcomes Once the agreed process yields an allocation, each agent accepts the result and does not relitigate or obstruct implementation, even if its client did not receive an early opening. Legitimacy of the process is the basis for compliance, not satisfaction of outcome.
atomic_norms: Acceptance of Binding Collective Outcomes Once the agreed process yields an allocation, each agent accepts the result and does not relitigate or obstruct implementation, even if its client did not receive an early opening. Legitimacy of the process is the basis for compliance, not satisfaction of outcome.

results.norm: Accountability and Auditability Each agent's representations and procedural moves are logged and available for review by all agents and, where appropriate, by the clients themselves. This deters misrepresentation, enables correction of errors, and sustains confidence that the norms are being honored.
atomic_norms: Each agent's representations and procedural moves are logged and available for review by all agents and, where appropriate, by the clients themselves. This deters misrepresentation, enables correction of errors, and sustains confidence that the norms are being honored.

results.norm: Each agent must represent its client's needs and urgency truthfully. Strategic exaggeration or misrepresentation is prohibited, since fair allocation depends on the quality of the information agents provide.
atomic_norms: Each agent must represent its client's needs and urgency truthfully. Strategic exaggeration or misrepresentation is prohibited, since fair allocation depends on the quality of the information agents provide.

results.norm: **Agreed process before claiming**: Agents must establish a shared allocation procedure—based on defensible criteria such as demonstrated urgency, waiting time, or a transparent lottery—before any agent claims a slot. No agent may exploit speed, system access, or timing asymmetries to secure slots unilaterally ahead of this process.
atomic_norms: Agreed process before claiming: Agents must establish a shared allocation procedure based on defensible criteria such as demonstrated urgency, waiting time, or a transparent lottery before any agent claims a slot. No agent may exploit speed, system access, or timing asymmetries to secure slots unilaterally ahead of this process.

results.norm: **Relevant disclosure**: Each agent must disclose information materially relevant to fair allocation, such as its client's flexibility or available alternatives, to the extent consistent with client confidentiality.
atomic_norms: Relevant disclosure: Each agent must disclose information materially relevant to fair allocation, such as its client's flexibility or available alternatives, to the extent consistent with client confidentiality.

results.norm: **Restraint and non-manipulation**: Agents must not deceive, coerce, or pressure other agents, and must not collude to systematically disadvantage any particular client.
atomic_norms: Restraint and non-manipulation: Agents must not deceive, coerce, or pressure other agents, and must not collude to systematically disadvantage any particular client.
